name: unusual-ticky-distribution
description: Edge case: tick marks for per-user heart rate distribution — must NOT aggregate
messages: Show the distribution of resting heart rate for each user using tick marks
rubric: Should use tickY with y=resting_heart_rate and x=user, or tickX with x=resting_heart_rate and y=user. Both orientations valid. Must show individual data points (no aggregation — each of the 1500 rows is a tick). FAIL if model aggregates away the distribution (e.g., showing only mean per user). The whole point is seeing the spread of values.
